channel.title: Finance 新闻汇总 - Free News Agent
channel.description: Finance 分类的最新新闻汇总，由 Free News Agent 自动生成，Gemini AI 筛选优质内容。

item.title: Higher inflation is on the way. The Fed needs to make this clear before it raises rates.
item.description: <![CDATA[Higher inflation is on the way. The Fed needs to make this clear before it raises rates.]]>

item.title: Wall Street dealers boost Treasury holdings to highest level since 2007
item.description: <![CDATA[Wall Street dealers boost Treasury holdings to highest level since 2007]]>

item.title: California is one step closer to America’s first billionaire wealth tax — and the divide between red and blue state taxes is getting deeper
item.description: <![CDATA[California is one step closer to America’s first billionaire wealth tax — and the divide between red and blue state taxes is getting deeper]]>

item.title: Milken family office alumni raise $4bn to target private capital upheaval
item.description: <![CDATA[Milken family office alumni raise $4bn to target private capital upheaval]]>

item.title: Rivian CEO’s $403mn pay package dwarfs those of top US car bosses
item.description: <![CDATA[Rivian CEO’s $403mn pay package dwarfs those of top US car bosses]]>
